items.message: [change-quality-check] Run python3 tools/change_quality.py: compare recent sessions vs. baseline on knowledge production + overhead. Flag WEAK sessions. A session rated WEAK 2+ consecutive times = root-cause diagnosis needed. (L-223). S464: 3/5 WEAK (S460/S461/S464). Long-term trend IMPROVING (+85%). (every ~5 sessions, last: S464)

[historian-routing] Historian routing + repair scan: (1) run python3 tools/historian_router.py — identify MERGED domain lanes with global frontier synthesis candidates; (2) run frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6 to maintain crosslinks (L-1022: link decay); (3) run historian_repair.py — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s), apply --repair to close stale lanes. Route synthesis-ready work to dispatch. F-NK6 M3 mechanism (L-996, L-800). S436: domain→global linkage 28.3%. Target: maintain ≥20% linkage. L-1060: cadence 5→3 (M3 routing generates ~2 updates/session; tighter cadence maintains global coverage). (every ~5 sessions, last: S464)
2 active dispatch lane(s) have no active coordinator lane: DOMEX-META-S476, DOMEX-META-S475
Count drift in INDEX.md (L: stated 1079 vs actual 1087) — run python3 tools/sync_state.py
